span.p: Physical inventory vs system - difference exceeds state tolerance?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Is a regulatory notice or inspection in progress?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Compliance event - freeze movement on affected packages and notify seed-to-sale specialist immediately

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Standard reconciliation - document cause and correct within the daily reconciliation window

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Stop all discretionary operations - provide inspector access - document every step

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Does the finding touch a mandatory reporting category - failed test / waste / theft / diversion?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Mandatory report - identify the state reporting window and file - route to seed-to-sale specialist and cannabis counsel

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Internal corrective action - document root cause - update SOP - close within 5 business days
